items.desc: Agenda for CLSO meeting: - Ask for an update on meeting with OER on SCM task force and CSLO support - Reflect back on Oracle presentation and agree on plan forward - Check with Mohammed on guest pass for Laura and Vincenzo - etc.

items.desc: Prioritize development of CSLO's operating model - tentative deadline for 1st review: 17/04
items.author: Vincenzo

items.desc: Pilot Countries: Let's wait until the meeting with Marta and colleagues on SCM AA  as the desk officers are also present, I assume we can explore the pilot countries during this meeting as well.
items.author: Vincenzo

items.desc: Control Tower: I'll continue the work as planned; next step will be to put together the functional requirements and present a comprehensive package.
items.author: Vincenzo

items.desc: KPIs: Given all the other new work areas, I propose we postpone this discussion

items.desc: Carry out Laura's onboarding and assign key responsibilities

items.desc: Tim to develop a consolidated draft of the functional requirements to be shared by FAO colleagues by 10/04

items.desc: Set up and facilitate meeting between Arslen, Moto, and Mohammed to reflect on Oracle's presentation, compile and align on a list of priorities for systems advancements, and come up with a plan on how to proceed. Tentative date: 09/04
items.author: Vincenzo

items.desc: Agenda for alignment w/ Arslen: 1) Any updates from his side. 2) Meeting with OER on SCM task force and CSLO surge support. 3) Plan for Haiti surge support and plan for meeting with FAOR. 4) Laura's secondment - timeline and place of work. 5) Collect guidance on how to proceed on selection of pilot COs for the action plan
items.author: Vincenzo
